title: Decision Flowchart: Using the Hessian Matrix in Optimization
description: A flowchart demonstrating how the Hessian matrix is used to determine the nature of a critical point (minimum, maximum, saddle point) in a multivariable optimization problem.
elements: Function f(x) at Critical Point x*
relationships: Flow from Function to Compute Hessian
Flow from Compute Hessian to Check Eigenvalues
Conditional branch from Check Eigenvalues to three outcomes based on eigenvalue signs
Outcome flows lead to final classification of the critical point
